scenarioLine: You arrive at a Dutch birthday. There's a circle of chairs and everyone looks up.

options.text: Everyone, not just the birthday person
No one until someone greets you

reveal: You congratulate the family too, not only the jarige (the birthday person). A warm "Gefeliciteerd met je dochter!" (Congrats on your daughter!) does it. Then sit down for coffee and cake.
cta: Save this before your next Dutch birthday.
